Book a discovery call
For vendors

Where HR-tech vendors earn the trust they can't buy.

Vendor marketing has a structural trust problem: it's hard to build credibility with the people you're selling to. Kyle & Co partners with vendors who want a front-row seat to the problems practitioners are working through. That's how vendors stay ahead of innovation cycles based on market need, not just competitive edge.

Book a discovery call →
The problem

The shift.

Your marketing isn't broken. Your team talks with practitioners, shares innovation insights, and surfaces best practices. The work means well and often lands at one altitude: feature feedback, broad signals, the metrics leaders are chasing.

The deeper conversations happen elsewhere. Practitioners talk candidly with each other behind closed doors. They compare what's working, what isn't, what they wouldn't say on a panel. That's a gap your team can't close, no matter how many roundtables you host. A mile wide, an inch deep.

Kyle & Co works at that depth. Practitioners shape the research and surface what they're working through. As a partner, you take a seat at the same table and bring the technology expertise the market needs to make sense of what's coming next.

Working together

Four ways to strategically work with us.

01
Underwriting.

Your category is crowded. Buyers trust each other more than they trust your content. The Human-Centric AI Council is the room where HR practitioners compare notes on what's working. Underwriting puts your brand in that room over multiple quarters, not just once.

Multi-quarter partnership
02
Activations.

A product launch, a market entry, a conference week. The moments where most vendors throw money at noise. Kyle & Co builds activations around the moment that produce something practitioners pass around. Event panels, executive briefings, post-event recap content with reach.

Launch & activation
03
Research.

You have a market claim that needs data behind it. Or a category that needs an independent voice to map it. Custom research, Category Compass collaborations, focus groups. The work is yours to cite for as long as the data holds.

Research & data
04
Advisory.

You're rebuilding positioning. You're sizing a new product bet. You're trying to read where the category is going and what your seat is in it. Strategic advisory hours, product advisory, executive workshops. We're the thinking partner who's seen this from the buying side.

Advisory

Every engagement starts with a discovery call. Book yours.

Why it works

Why this works.

Each year, Kyle & Co publishes an annual market study, quarterly Category Compass reports, and bespoke client research. The work is built on surveys with thousands of senior HR and TA leaders. The Human-Centric AI Council adds practitioner-led work on AI. Our edge is pairing primary research with rigorous secondary analysis, because neither catches the full signal alone. That's the research base your team can cite, your sellers can quote, and your buyers can fact-check on the open web.

Vendors already in the work

Vendors already in the work.

The team at Kyle & Co is on the pulse of the market. Through this initiative they've been hungry for insight, sharp with their questions, and operated through a practitioner's lens. They're committed to ensuring buyers have the most complete information possible.

KF
Katie Fairbank
Director of Product Marketing, CodeSignal

Every time we meet with Kyle and his team, we walk away smarter. They're constantly exploring the newest trends in our space, and their thoughtful questions help reveal what really matters to practitioners.

BF
Birch Faber
Director of Marketing, Humanly
Let's talk

Bring us the question.

The category your team is trying to map. The launch that has to land. The positioning that hasn't moved the buyer. The strategy you're sizing. Bring any of it to a 30-minute discovery call and we'll scope what fits.
